Description

## Gyeon QÂ˛M Bathe Plus Ceramic Shampoo:

Bathe+ is a shampoo that leaves a hydrophobic layer behind.Â  It shares properties from Q2M WetCoat, but in a shampoo form.Â  Use as normal in your wash bucket, or use in a snow foam lance after your final rinse to add a hydrophobic layer to your entire car.

EFFICIENT**

Only 15-20ml of Bathe+ diluted in ca. 12 litres of water is enough to both cleanse the bodywork of your vehicle and leave a smooth, self cleaning and hydrophobic layer.

**EASY TO USE/TIME SAVING**

When it comes to all-in-one products, Q2M Bathe+ can be claimed to be revolutionary! Just a quick wash is enough to obtain a marvellous hydrophobic effect and easy maintenance for the next couple of weeks. It is a phenomenal solution for the wintertime, when washing gets harder and the boost in self-cleaning abilities improves the comfort of vehicle maintenance.

**1ST EVER SIOâ SHAMPOO**

Q2M Bathe+ is the worldâs first pH neutral shampoo containing SiO2. Even a quick wash leaves a strong hydrophobic layer, repelling water, dirt and prolonging the need for a next wash. The wash itself is a real joy, while the shampoo is very slick and has a scent characteristic of the whole Gyeon range.

**SAFE ON PAINT, GLASS & RIMS**

Q2M BATHE+ is perfectly safe on all surfaces including paint, rims, glass and plastic and it will add instant protection to bare surfaces or boost the base quartz coating you already have on these surfaces. It can also be used over existing natural waxes or sealants improving their durability and gloss. And the real proof is when you rinse off the car â you can see the added protection with water beading off for yourself!

**ADDED SELF CLEANING**

The active SIO2 ingredient adds real protection that you can see every time you wash, unlike many so called âwash and waxâ shampoos, you are left with added hydrophobicity and self-cleaning ability that keeps your car actively cleaner for longer. However this amazing car wash is pH-neutral and therefore delicate finishes such as nickel / chrome plated or highly polished elements remain pristine.

**ADVICE ON APPLICATION:**

- Can be used in your wash bucket or after your final rinse via a foam lance to achieve an instant hydrophobic layer.

- Always wash your carâs paint with a Q2M MittÂ or Woolie Mitt in order to prevent scratches or swirl marks.

**PRECAUTIONS:**

- Keep out of reach of children.

- Seek medical attention if swallowed.

Shipping

Orders are processed within 1 working day, with no shipping on weekends. If there are delays, we will contact you by email or phone. Shipping charges are calculated at checkout based on your selected method and location.
We offer various shipping options, including Royal Mail, Parcelforce, Hermes, and APC Overnight. Overnight delivery is available only within the continental United Kingdom. You will receive a shipment confirmation email with a tracking number once your order has been dispatched.
Gold Label Car Care is not responsible for customs, duties, or taxes imposed during or after shipping. These fees are the customer's responsibility. Additionally, we're not liable for products damaged or lost during shipping. If your item is damaged upon arrival, contact the shipment carrier to file a claim.
For more information or to track your shipment, refer to your order confirmation email. Currently, we ship only within the United Kingdom. Special handling charges may apply for items weighing over 25kg.

Refund Policy

We offer a 30-day return policy from the date of receipt. To be eligible for a return, items must be in their original condition, unworn, unused, with tags, and in their original packaging. Keep your receipt or proof of purchase for all returns.
To initiate a return, contact us at [customerservice@goldlabelcarcare.co.uk](mailto:customerservice@goldlabelcarcare.co.uk). If your return is approved due to damage or fault, we will send you a return shipping label and instructions. We do not accept returns for items sent back without prior approval.
Refunds are processed back to your original payment method once the returned item is received and inspected. Non-returnable items include perishable goods, custom products, personal care items, hazardous materials, sale items, and gift cards. 
For exchanges, return your item and make a separate purchase for the replacement. Contact us for any questions about returns or refunds.
